category_sources: source_facts.description says XML to manpage converter; official SourceForge project describes xmltoman/xmlmantohtml converting XML to groff man pages or HTML.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xmltoman; official SourceForge project is XML to Man converter and names xmltoman.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project page; it is the best official documentation surface found for the small scripts.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code section; no newer official repository was confirmed for the Homebrew 0.4 lineage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify XML-to-manpage/HTML conversion; official SourceForge project states the scripts convert XML to groff or HTML.
